meaning: n.奥克兰(新西兰北岛西北岸港市)
examples: The man who traveled to Auckland instead of Oakland didn't feel like laughing.
If you have a chance, do visit the Auckland Museum because they have the last surviving "birdman" kite on display.
For example, Newman accepts it would be hard for a city as hilly as Auckland to develop a really good rail network.
He also noted that this trend will be most evident in the Auckland region.
Guests filled Auckland's Holy Trinity Anglican Cathedral and an overflow area next door for a service.
